name: Bloomberg Terminal
description_short: The gold standard institutional financial terminal with real-time data, analytics, news, and communication tools used by 325,000+ professionals.
description_long:
Bloomberg Terminal is the undisputed standard for professional financial data and analysis, used by over 325,000 finance professionals worldwide including traders, portfolio managers, analysts, and executives. The terminal provides comprehensive real-time market data, analytics, news, and communication tools across every asset class and market globally.

The terminal's capabilities are vast: real-time pricing for millions of securities, proprietary analytics tools (PORT, MARS, BQNT), Bloomberg's own news service with 2,700+ journalists, the Bloomberg Messaging system for secure institutional communication, and API access for custom integrations.

At approximately $24,000 per year ($2,000/month) per user, Bloomberg Terminal is firmly positioned for institutional use. However, its influence on financial markets is so pervasive that understanding what it offers helps retail traders appreciate the information advantage institutional players have.
pros: Most comprehensive financial data source in existence
Real-time data across every market globally
cons: $24,000/year makes it inaccessible for most retail traders
Requires significant training to use effectively
